title: PCB Layout, DRC & Routing
description: Owns the full layout-to-route cycle: places footprints, iterates DRC to zero errors, auto-routes with Freerouter, and verifies post-route DRC. Uses pcb_layout, pcb_drc, and pcb_route pipeline tools.
context: PCB workspace: /workspace/pcb. Pipeline tools: pcb_layout, pcb_drc, pcb_route, generate_pcb_thumbnail.
